label: DCM-LocalCatalogue
info:
Backend flow for Local Catalogue.

MongoDB collection:
  lc_assets – normalized local catalogue asset records
             populated by Harvest, managed here.

Operations:
  getLocalCatalogue  – list all lc_assets
  deleteLocalAsset   – delete by uniqueId
  updateLocalAsset   – update fields by uniqueId

All responses are sent back to the Dashboard via link-out → dashboard-linkin (1320340df737c22e).

name: ══ Local Catalogue Backend ══
info:
Handles Local Catalogue operations.
lc_assets are written during Harvest and managed here.

name: response — getLocalCatalogue
Delete Local Asset — by uniqueId
response — deleteLocalAsset
Update Local Asset — by uniqueId
response — updateLocalAsset
